name: Falcon BAR400
comment: Eagle Lite FALCON BAR400 – 16X20W RGBW LED BAR IP65: The Falcon BAR400 is a powerful IP65-rated LED bar that delivers 8.169 lumens through 16 x 20W RGBW LEDs. With 16-section pixel control and optional frost filters (15°, 40°, 60×10°), it can be adapted to any setup. The Falcon BAR400 has the same bundling system as the Falcon FX400, making it easy to combine multiple units.
